[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101101 4
1 10101010 4
2 11111100 6
3 01111100 5
4 01111111 7
5 01101011 5
6 11111111 a
7 11011001 5
